modules.name: Telegram Bot
modules.description: Bridge ClawbotOS AI to Telegram — send messages, get status, chat with your AI from anywhere.
modules.author: Yumi Lab

modules.name: Voice I/O
modules.description: Offline speech recognition (Vosk) and text-to-speech (espeak-ng). Talk to your AI assistant.
modules.author: Yumi Lab

modules.name: TouchScreen UI
modules.description: SmartPad animated persona interface with touch controls and voice interaction.
modules.author: Yumi Lab

modules.name: Camera Vision
modules.description: Add a camera to ClawbotOS — capture images and let the AI describe or analyze them.
modules.author: Yumi Lab

modules.name: MQTT / Home Automation
modules.description: Connect ClawbotOS to your smart home via MQTT. Control devices through the AI.
modules.author: Yumi Lab
